message:
test: add 36 property tests for release_readiness_gates and tuning_config

proptest_release_readiness_gates (16 tests):
- 8 serde roundtrip tests for all types (ReleaseDecision, GateCheck,
  GateReport, GatePolicy, LeakEvidenceStatus, SoakEvidenceStatus,
  GateInputs)
- 8 evaluation invariant tests (check count, blocking flags, Ready/Blocked
  consistency, failed_count, stable gate IDs, render_summary content)

proptest_tuning_config (20 tests):
- 15 serde roundtrip tests for all sub-configs (RuntimeTuning through
  WeztermTuning plus TuningConfig aggregate)
- 5 default invariant tests (default roundtrip, empty JSON defaults,
  partial JSON fill, CASS constructor determinism, on-error timeout)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
